title: Business Valuation in Chhattisgarh | Virtual Auditor
description: Business Valuation in Chhattisgarh. From ₹50,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. IBBI-compliant business valuation using DCF, market approach. Contact +91 99622 6
bodyText:
What is business valuation services? IBBI-compliant business valuation using DCF, market approach, NAV. For M&A, fundraising, tax compliance, FEMA, IBC.
Business Valuation Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Chhattisgarh, Chhattisgarh since 2012.
Quick Answer: Business Valuation in Chhattisgarh — IBBI-compliant business valuation using DCF, market approach, NAV. For M&A, fundraising, tax complia. From ₹50,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Business Valuation Services in Chhattisgarh
Virtual Auditor provides business valuation services across Chhattisgarh. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Chhattisgarh with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Mumbai (Chhattisgarh) handles company registrations and filings for Chhattisgarh. Stamp duty: As per state schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

HEADING2: Our Service Scope
• DCF Valuation (Discounted Cash Flow)
• Comparable Company Analysis
• NAV (Net Asset Value) Method
• FEMA/FDI Valuation (Rule 11UA)
• ESOP Valuation (Ind AS 102)
• 409A Valuation
• IBC Valuation (Reg. 35)
• Fairness Opinion

HEADING2: Step-by-Step Process
• 1
HEADING3: Step 1: Scope Definition
Identify valuation purpose, standard of value, premise
• 2
HEADING3: Step 2: Data Collection
Financial statements, projections, market data
• 3
HEADING3: Step 3: Analysis
Apply 3-5 valuation methods with Monte Carlo simulation
• 4

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Chhattisgarh
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your business valuation is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.
Technology that accelerates: Automated compliance calendars, AI-assisted document analysis, and 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations for valuations.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: What is an IBBI Registered Valuer?
faqs.a: A professional registered with IBBI under the Registered Valuers Regulations, 2017. Required for valuations under Companies Act and IBC.

faqs.q: How many valuation methods do you use?
faqs.a: We use up to 18 methods with 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations per engagement for statistically defensible results.

faqs.q: How long does a valuation report take?
faqs.a: Standard reports in 7-10 working days. Complex multi-framework valuations may take 15-20 days.

faqs.q: Do you provide business valuation services in Chhattisgarh?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Chhattisgarh from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Chhattisgarh?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Chhattisgarh fall under ROC Mumbai (Chhattisgarh). Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Chhattisgarh-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Chhattisgarh?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Chhattisgarh: As per state schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
